svg.text: Figure 3. Robustness of hypotension-burden dose-response shape
Original nonlinearity attenuated after P99 winsorization; adjusted for hypoxemia burden, age, sex, and GCS
Nominal nonlinearity; not robust after P99
Adjusted odds ratio vs zero hypotension burden

The original RCS showed nominal curvature, but after capping high-leverage values at the eICU P99 (5.22), the RCS no longer improved fit over the winsorized linear term (P=0.132). Shaded bands are approximate
95% CIs, supporting tail-sensitive shape instability rather than a clinical cutoff.
Both panels use the same x- and y-axis scales. P50, P90, and P99 show eICU model-set distribution percentiles.
